title: Checkbox Class
description: Represents a checkbox that displays a boolean value. The simplest control in this library.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create checkbox control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: checked?: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets value indicating whether this checkbox is checked.

properties.name: text: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the text of the name element of the control; the default value is <mark>''</mark> (empty string).

properties.name: nullable: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the value can be null; the default is <mark>true</mark>.

properties.name: readonly: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the control is not mutable, meaning the user can not edit the control; the default is <mark>false</mark>.

events.name: checkboxchange
events.description: The change event is fired when the user modifies and commits the checked.
